The mention of specific defense spending percentages adds credibility. However, the baseline score of 217 indicates a pre-existing moderate support for alliance commitment, which is not entirely dismissed by the exposure. request_payload.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategist, I've seen firsthand how our allies take advantage of our generosity. Why should we keep carrying the burden when countries like Germany spend just 1.5% of GDP on defense? It's time to put America first and demand fair burden-sharing. #NATO #NationalSecurity
